THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: THE COURT ORDERS THAT RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $1,679.50 US CURRENCY BE RELEASED TO ATTY ZADIK SHAPIRO ON BEHALF OF CLAIMANT JAIN A HAGGERSTONE. IT IS FURTHER ORDERED THAT RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $1,679.50 US CURRENCY, PLUS INTEREST SINCE THE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PUR TO THE PROVISIONS OF HEALTH & SAFETY CODE SECTION 11470 ET SEQ. AS AGAINST ANY AND ALL INTEREST PARTIES AND ABE DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY THE PROVISIONS OF HEALTH & SAFETY CODE SECTION 11489. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
